title: orchis morio subsp. caucasica
intro: Orchis morio subsp. caucasica, also known as the Caucasian bee orchid, is a rare and endangered subspecies of the Orchis morio, a type of orchid native to the Caucasus region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orchis morio subsp. caucasica include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, often used to treat a range of health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
